problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Reservoir computing with physical substrate may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
